reviews.heading: What Customers Say
reviews.review1Text: Servis yang sangat bagus! Technician datang tepat pada masa dan buat kerja dengan bersih. Aircond saya sejuk balik selepas chemical wash. Definitely will call again.
reviews.review2Text: Called at 10am, technician was here by 11:30. Fixed the gas leak and topped up the refrigerant on the spot. Price was fair and he explained everything clearly.
reviews.review3Text: Saya hubungi melalui WhatsApp dan dapat respons dalam masa 10 minit. Servis cepat, bersih dan profesional. Syorkan kepada semua orang di Penang!
reviews.review4Text: Our office airconds in PJ were all giving problems. Encik Beku sent two technicians who serviced all 6 units in one afternoon. Very organised, very professional. We signed a yearly maintenance contract with them.
reviews.review5Text: Aircond dah 3 hari tak sejuk, risau kena charge mahal. Tapi Encik Beku quote RM150 je untuk top-up gas, siap check semua. No hidden charges betul-betul. Sangat recommended!
reviews.review6Text: Booked a chemical wash for my bedroom unit. Technician arrived on time, laid down protective sheets, and did a thorough job. My aircond smells fresh now and cools so much better. Worth every ringgit.

howItWorks.heading: Three Steps to a Cool Home
howItWorks.step1Desc: Send us a message with your location and what service you need. We reply within minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We confirm availability, give you a price estimate, and dispatch a certified technician.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your aircond is serviced, repaired, or installed — and we clean up before we leave.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does aircond servicing cost?
faq.a1: Standard servicing starts from RM80 per wall-mounted unit and RM120 for ceiling cassette. Chemical wash starts from RM180. We always quote before starting — no hidden charges.
faq.q2: How fast can you send a technician?
faq.a2: We aim to respond within 1 hour of your WhatsApp. Same-day service is available 7 days a week across all 38 cities we cover.
faq.a3: All major brands — Daikin, Panasonic, Midea, York, Samsung, Hisense, Sharp, Gree, Acson, Haier, LG, and more.
faq.q4: Do you provide warranty on your work?
faq.a4: Yes. Every service job comes with a 30-day workmanship warranty. If something goes wrong within that period, we come back and fix it at no extra cost.
faq.a5: Aircond yang tidak sejuk biasanya disebabkan gas refrigerant yang rendah, penapis kotor, atau masalah kompresor. Technician kami boleh diagnose dan repair on the spot.
faq.q6: Berapa lama proses cuci aircond chemical wash?
faq.a6: Chemical wash biasanya mengambil masa 45 minit hingga 1 jam per unit. Kami akan buka unit, rendam dalam chemical solution, cuci bersih, dan pasang semula.
faq.a7: Bunyi bising boleh disebabkan oleh kipas yang longgar, bearing yang rosak, atau bahagian dalaman yang kotor. Hubungi kami via WhatsApp untuk diagnosis percuma.
faq.q8: Can you install a new aircond unit?
faq.a8: Absolutely. We handle full installations — brackets, piping, electrical connections, and commissioning for all unit types including split, cassette, and ducted systems.
faq.q9: Do you service office and commercial aircond?
faq.a9: Yes. We service both residential and commercial aircond systems including ceiling cassettes, VRF systems, and ducted units commonly found in offices and shops.
faq.a10: We cover 38 cities across Malaysia — Klang Valley, Penang, Johor Bahru, Ipoh, Kuantan, Kota Kinabalu, Kuching, and more. Check our locations section for the full list.
